LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-13-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS BOYDEN WORLD CORPORATION, AND RICHARD MCCALLISTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 25, 2022. BY OCTOBER 19, 2022, PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE AND SERVE AN AMENDED OPPOSING SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1350. STARTING AT UNDISPUTED FACT 7, PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSING SEPARATE STATEMENT DOES NOT CORRESPOND TO THE NUMERICAL SEQUENCING OF DEFENDANT'S SEPARATE STATEMENT. DEFENDANT'S SEPARATE STATEMENT HAS 96 FACTS, BUT PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSING SEPARATE STATEMENT LISTS 98 FACTS. PLAINTIFF SHALL ALSO PROVIDE AN AMENDED POINTS AND AUTHORITIES THAT CORRECTLY CITES THE EVIDENCE. THE PLAINTIFF SHALL LODGE A COURTESY COPY OF THE AMENDED FILINGS WITH DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER THAT REFLECTS THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

*** Order GRANTING IN PART AND DENYING IN PART DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is signed after hearing.***

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS BOYDEN WORLD CORPORATION, and RICHARD MCCALLISTER's Motion For Summary Adjudication.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is continued to October 25, 2022. By October 19, 2022, plaintiff shall file and serve an amended opposing separate statement of facts that complies with CRC 3.1350. Starting at undisputed fact 7, plaintiff's opposing separate statement does not correspond to the numerical sequencing of defendant's separate statement. Defendant's separate statement has 96 facts, but plaintiff's opposing separate statement lists 98 facts. Plaintiff shall also provide an amended points and authorities that correctly cites the evidence. The plaintiff shall lodge a courtesy copy of the amended filings with department 302 with a cover letter that reflects the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
